title: Airdrop Eligibility Checker
description: Check whether a wallet meets configurable airdrop criteria — transaction count, wallet age, multi-chain activity, specific protocol interactions, and minimum balance thresholds.
useCase: Build an airdrop checker tool that evaluates wallets against a configurable set of criteria and returns a pass/fail with score breakdown — like the Arbitrum or OP airdrop checker.

keyParams.walletAddress: Wallet address to evaluate for airdrop eligibility
keyParams.criteria.minChainCount: Minimum number of chains the wallet must be active on
keyParams.criteria.requiredContracts: Array of contract addresses the wallet must have interacted with
